def even_bit_toggle(n):
    result = 0
    for i in range(1, n.bit_length() + 1):
        if i % 2 == 0:
            result ^= (1 << i)
    return result

        if i % 2 == 0:
            result ^= (1 << i)
    return result

arguments.answer:
The Python function to toggle all even bits is defined as follows:

def even_bit_toggle(n):
    result = 0
    for i in range(1, n.bit_length() + 1):
        if i % 2 == 0:
            result ^= (1 << i)
    return result

# Test cases
assert even_bit_toggle(10) == 0
assert even_bit_toggle(20) == 30
assert even_bit_toggle(30) == 20
